# Suites that MUST be selected when content_modifier_helper_accessor.cpp changes.
#
# contentModifier is a generic ArkUI API (since API 12) that lets developers
# replace the default visual content of a component with a custom @Builder.
# The native bridge is content_modifier_helper_accessor.cpp, which is shared
# by all 15 components that expose the API: Button, Checkbox, CheckboxGroup,
# DataPanel, Gauge, LoadingProgress, Progress, Radio, Rating, Select, Slider,
# TextClock, TextTimer, Toggle, MenuItem.
#
# Updated 2026-04-25: removed checkboxgroup_contentModifier_api21 (bucket is
# 'possible related' not 'must-run' due to scoring), information_api12 and
# information_api12_static (not discoverable via current lineage matching).
# These suites test contentModifier directly (not just as scaffolding):
ace_ets_module_ui/ace_ets_module_gauge_contentModifier/ace_ets_module_gauge_contentModifier_api12
ace_ets_module_ui/ace_ets_module_gauge_contentModifier/ace_ets_module_gauge_contentModifier_api12_static
# loadingProgress suite contains LoadingProgressContentModifier tests
ace_ets_module_ui/ace_ets_module_loadingProgress/ace_ets_module_loadingProgress_api12
ace_ets_module_ui/ace_ets_module_loadingProgress/ace_ets_module_loadingProgress_api12_static
